topology_checklist.source_fact: Upper dashed capture ray connects display and smartphone.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Upper dashed orange-red capture ray is present and unobstructed.

topology_checklist.source_fact: Lower dashed capture ray connects display and smartphone.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Lower dashed orange-red capture ray is present and unobstructed.

topology_checklist.source_fact: Fast-time arrow points right above the four subframes.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Right-pointing navy time arrow spans the four-subframe row.

topology_checklist.source_fact: First subframe feeds the human eye.
topology_checklist.replica_status: First green diagonal arrow reaches the eye.

topology_checklist.source_fact: Second subframe feeds the human eye.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Second green diagonal arrow reaches the eye.

topology_checklist.source_fact: Third subframe feeds the human eye.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Third green diagonal arrow reaches the eye.

topology_checklist.source_fact: Fourth subframe feeds the human eye.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Fourth green diagonal arrow reaches the eye.

topology_checklist.source_fact: The eye feeds the readable display.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Solid green horizontal arrow reaches the readable display.

topology_checklist.source_fact: The selected second subframe feeds the camera.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Orange-red vertical arrow leaves the bracketed second subframe and reaches the camera.

topology_checklist.source_fact: Camera output feeds one sparse fragment.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Orange-red horizontal arrow connects camera and sparse fragment.

topology_checklist.source_fact: The sparse fragment reaches OCR failure.
topology_checklist.replica_status: Orange-red horizontal arrow terminates at OCR ×.

visual_checklist.source_expectation: Two panel headings are clear and balanced.
visual_checklist.replica_status: Both headings are single-line, aligned, and readable at 3.50-inch width.

visual_checklist.source_expectation: Authorized user, sensitive display, and smartphone labels remain readable.
visual_checklist.replica_status: All physical-scene labels and both PRIVATE DATA lines are intact without overlap.

visual_checklist.source_expectation: The user-screen-phone triangle reads as one physical eavesdropping scene.
visual_checklist.replica_status: Editable office line art clearly shows one authorized user, one display, and one smartphone threat.

visual_checklist.source_expectation: Eye, integration label, readable display, and output label occupy separate zones.
visual_checklist.replica_status: Human eye, integration text, readable label, output display, and green arrows are separated and legible.

visual_checklist.source_expectation: Four thumbnails, fast-time arrow, selection bracket, and subframe label remain distinct.
visual_checklist.replica_status: All four thumbnails share a baseline; the second is bracketed; time and caption zones are distinct.

visual_checklist.source_expectation: Camera, instantaneous-sampling label, fragment, and OCR failure are cleanly separated.
visual_checklist.replica_status: Sampling caption has its own band; camera, fragment, labels, arrows, and OCR × do not overlap.

visual_checklist.source_expectation: All labels remain readable at final publication size.
visual_checklist.replica_status: The 300 dpi, 3.50-inch render contains no broken words or clipped labels.

visual_checklist.source_expectation: Human and camera paths remain distinguishable without color alone.
visual_checklist.replica_status: Eye/camera icons, four-to-one versus one-frame topology, bracket selection, and outcome wording provide redundant encoding.
